items.text: Dear Ms. Lee, Your requested book from City Library has arrived. A $2.50 processing fee is due upon pickup. Please collect it at the Circulation Desk by this Friday, May 12. Best regards, Interlibrary Loan Office.

questions.stem: According to the email, what must the recipient do by Friday?

options.A: To request another book from the City Library
options.B: To pay a $5.00 fee at the Circulation Desk
options.C: To return the book to the Interlibrary Loan Office
options.D: To pick up the book and pay the processing fee

questions.explanation: The email states the book is at the Circulation Desk and a $2.50 fee is due upon pickup, so the recipient must collect it and pay.

questions.stem: What is the fee mentioned in the email?
questions.explanation: The email specifies a $2.50 processing fee is due upon pickup.

items.text: Hi Mark, Your volunteer shift as a campus tour guide on May 15 from 2:00-4:00 PM is confirmed. Please report to Anderson Hall lobby 15 minutes early. Thanks, Dr. Park.

questions.stem: According to the email, where should Mark report for his shift?

options.C: At the campus tour bus stop

questions.explanation: The email instructs Mark to 'report to Anderson Hall lobby'.

questions.stem: In the email, the word 'confirmed' is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanation: 'Confirmed' in this context means the shift is officially scheduled or verified.
